title: The New Powerbook
content:
All these posts about the new "Powerbook":http://www.apple.com/powerbook/ really make me drool. People are talking about that beautiful, high resolution screen and how bright it is. After reading them, I feel like I want a Powerbook for myself.

Wait ...

I'm typing this on a Powerbook, am I. I guess I don't need one then. :P

%(me)This is first my attempt at procrastination.%
